assumption_statement: Workbook sheet schemas and indicator names are stable across required sheets
notes: Loader relies on expected sheet and column names

assumption_statement: Composite country score is weighted sum of KPI values and KPI weights
notes: Core baseline identity for all later phases

assumption_statement: Country rank is recomputed by descending composite score each evaluation point
notes: Used to generate baseline and simulated ranks

assumption_statement: Input KPI values are already on a comparable scale suitable for weighted aggregation
notes: No additional z-score normalization step is applied in baseline rebuild

assumption_statement: Small rounding differences are acceptable if rank order and key scores are preserved
notes: QA criterion for baseline reproduction

assumption_statement: Low base high anchors embedded in text are parseable and represent plausible policy impact bounds
notes: Parsing supports coefficient construction used in simulation

assumption_statement: Confidence labels map to deterministic multipliers that shrink or preserve effect sizes
notes: Uncertainty encoded through confidence factor

assumption_statement: Lag class categories correctly represent policy delay before measurable KPI impact
notes: Determines temporal onset of effects

assumption_statement: Competitor drift priors approximate exogenous progress in peer and global benchmark countries
notes: Drift enters quarterly simulation as stochastic term

assumption_statement: Policy start quarter and rollout intensity values are reasonable schedule proxies
notes: Decision docs mark schedule confidence as weak/inferred

assumption_statement: Multiple recommendation effects on the same KPI combine additively before constraints
notes: No interaction terms or nonlinear synergy penalties

assumption_statement: Indirect effects receive lower weight than direct effects by configured multipliers
notes: Controls magnitude for spillover pathways

assumption_statement: Effect coefficients are constant over simulation horizon after lag and rollout modulation
notes: No endogenous learning decay or saturation modeled explicitly

assumption_statement: KPI mapping in impact matrix is sufficiently comprehensive for recommendation scope
notes: Gaps in mapping may understate some channels

assumption_statement: Triangular distributions are suitable for uncertain drift and effect shocks under limited evidence
notes: Chosen for bounded support and interpretable parameters

assumption_statement: No action recommendation sets represent mutually interpretable intervention bundles
notes: Scenario definitions drive policy comparison outputs

assumption_statement: Quarterly step size is sufficient to capture policy ramp and KPI response timing
notes: Finer monthly dynamics are intentionally abstracted

assumption_statement: p10 median p90 adequately summarize distributional uncertainty for reporting
notes: Dashboard and report design are quantile-centric

assumption_statement: Simulated KPI trajectories remain within plausible domain through clipping or constraints
notes: Prevents unrealistic explosive or negative states

assumption_statement: No action trajectory is valid counterfactual baseline for attribution decomposition
notes: Attribution percentages depend on this anchor

assumption_statement: Gap reduction percent is computed relative to baseline gap and is meaningful across KPIs
notes: Core interpretation in recommendation performance claims

assumption_statement: Per-recommendation contributions can be apportioned without interaction correction
notes: May misallocate effects when strong interactions exist

assumption_statement: Peer best and global best are policy-relevant target references
notes: Benchmark framing influences perceived improvement headroom

assumption_statement: Attribution logic handles absent KPI records by skip or safe default without biasing totals
notes: Implementation favors robustness over strict completeness

assumption_statement: Dashboard defaults to median trajectories as central narrative for decision audiences
notes: Uncertainty bands are secondary context in visual narrative

assumption_statement: Dashboard loader required-column checks are sufficient to prevent silent visualization errors
notes: Guardrail for reproducible rendering

assumption_statement: Exported standalone HTML preserves interaction and value parity with in-app rendering
notes: Used for submission and evaluator review

assumption_statement: Traceability matrix covers all headline dashboard numbers and chart sources
notes: Supports auditability and chatbot grounding

assumption_statement: Users interpret scenario labels and recommendation cards as causal policy comparisons
notes: Requires clear caveats on observational and modeled uncertainty
